title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Japanese Derby. Meisho Doto's rival
of the hour, Admire Vega, pays her no attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega remains focused on seizing the
winner's star in dedication to her departed sister.
Meisho Doto can only look on in fear.
